summary: Testing completed for Cart Persistence bug fix and AI Campaign Maker feature. Both features are working correctly. Cart items persist in localStorage after navigation to checkout. AI Campaign Maker page loads with all UI elements and backend APIs return expected data.
critical_code_review_comments: CartContext.jsx uses lazy initialization in useState to prevent race condition - correct fix for cart persistence bug
AI Campaign backend uses emergentintegrations LLM library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for real AI content generation
All AI Campaign endpoints properly integrated: /api/ai-campaigns/config-status, /api/ai-campaigns/products, /api/ai-campaigns/generate
Frontend AICampaignMakerPage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Admin sidebar correctly includes AI Campagnes link under MARKETING section
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products from Supabase
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cart persistence and AI Campaign Maker features are fully functional. Backend uses Supabase for products and emergentintegrations library for AI content generation. AI generation takes 10-30 seconds per platform.

cart_persistence_localstorage.details: Cart items saved to localStorage with key 'droomvriendjes_cart' using lazy initialization in useState

cart_persistence_navigation.details: Cart items persist after navigation from /knuffels to /checkout - verified 3342 chars of cart data maintained

ai_campaigns_config_status.details: GET /api/ai-campaigns/config-status returns ai_ready: true, supabase_connected: true

ai_campaigns_generate.details: POST /api/ai-campaigns/generate returns generated content for Facebook/Instagram/TikTok with headline, caption, hashtags, cta

ai_campaign_maker_page_loads.details: Page loads at /admin/ai-campaigns with product selection, platform toggles, tone options, goal options

admin_sidebar_ai_link.details: AI Campagnes link visible in admin sidebar under MARKETING section

admin_login.details: Admin login works with credentials admin/Droomvriendjes2024!
